name: pm-ts-starter
description: TypeScript reference extension covering all 9 SDK capability types: commands, renderers, hooks, schema, importers, search, parser, preflight, services. Aligned to the pm-cli 2026.7.6 SDK: demonstrates defineExtension plus registerCommand/registerFlags (with failure_hints + typed positional arguments), registerItemFields/registerItemTypes/registerMigration, the five api.hooks.* lifecycle hooks, registerImporter/registerExporter (with ImportExportRegistrationOptions), registerRenderer, registerSearchProvider/registerVectorStoreAdapter, registerParser, registerPreflight, registerService, PmCliExpectedError-shaped errors, demo commands for the plan/context/search/history-compact pm surfaces, and a guided `ts-starter setup --interactive` onboarding - all fully typed.
author: @unbraind
